title: tragacantha globiceps
intro: Tragacantha globiceps, also known as the Globular Milkvetch, is a perennial legume native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Tragacantha globiceps include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and acting as an antioxidant, which can help protect against cell damage and oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of Tragacantha globiceps include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
